morning_brief.preview:
# EverPass Morning Brief — Monday, May 04, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive
1. **Victory+ NWSL amendment — UNSIGNED 11+ days.** NWSL launched 2026-04-23 without execution. Carry-forward TOP priority since 2026-04-20. Material legal exposure ongoing. Status: 57 matches, zero fee, Team Packs (18 teams) blended ARPU model still pending Finance.
2. **DIRECTV SymphonyAI audit demand letter — May 1 deadline LAPSED 3 days ago.** Net audit claim $2,634,239.50 ($65M+ Second Payment open). Pre-litigation posture; NY Sup. Ct. complaint v3 draft ready but unfiled (preserving TPG/RedBird backchannel). Confirm letter v6 transmission status today; if unsent, escalate to Kelley Drye (Brianna Santolli).
3. **Charter Exhibit B (Company Approved Offers) — May 1 deadline LAPSED 3 days ago.** Exhibit A (NFLST pricing) Apr 15 also lapsed. Roosters hardware-hold blocking enterprise-account close (NotebookLM W18). Formal Charter counter still outstanding (Holden vacation delay since wk of Apr 13).
4. **ESPN/TWDC — Danielle McIntosh Track A/B follow-up DUE Apr 22 (OVERDUE 12 days).** Reframe around NFL ~10% ESPN equity stake (confirmed Apr 6). Apr 13 draft cleared content-protection blocker (720p/L3) per W18 sweep. Open: DAI impression share % (blank), Rate Card MFN Schedule 1 (Under Review), shoulder-programming scope.
5. **Comcast Amendment lapsed 2026-04-15; Marquee Go/No-Go pending.** Comcast NFLST pricing + Base Referral Fees (Exhibit A/B) undelivered. Marquee paused/escalated (Sinclair Apr 3 redline removed packaging). Decision required.

## Active Deal Status
- **Charter** (Active, Distribution): Formal counter + 3 diligence Qs outstanding (DTV sub counts, multiplier methodology, sub-cat calibration). Exhibit A/B lapsed. Buy-Through req live by Jun 1, 2026. Next: chase Holden response + send Exhibits.
- **ESPN / TWDC** (Active, Content): Apr 13 draft resolved venue-auth + casino tiers + HDCP. McIntosh Track direction overdue. Next: redraft McIntosh follow-up under NFL/ESPN equity frame.
- **DIRECTV** (Pre-Litigation): Demand letter v6 + complaint draft. SymphonyAI deadline lapsed. Next: confirm letter transmission; Board Go/No-Go on filing.
- **Comcast** (TBD): Amendment lapsed Apr 15. Bounty + Sunday Ticket structure undefined.
- **NBCU / Peacock** (Active, Content): CRITICAL mortality risk — term expires 2027-07-31 (~15 mo). Activation conditional on Fox One + ESPN Unlimited. CEO Kaplan to escalate.
- **WBD** (Active): Awaiting Hoffberg rate card (committed Apr 11). Long-form agreement shift (Mar 24).
- **Netflix Boxing** (Near Close): $500K cancellation fee on Mayweather/Pacquiao open; counter = MG credit toward future event.
- **Marquee / Sinclair** (Active, RSN): Paused / Go/No-Go. Sinclair Apr 3 redline removed packaging.
- **CHSN** (Live): -$2,851 monthly steady-state loss; package w/ Marquee.
- **Monumental** (Near Close, RSN): Tech conv. to complete; July 2026 launch target.
- **NESN** (Active): Awaiting response to Apr 12 clean term sheet v7 (Plaehn/Harper); 5-biz-day follow-up window elapsed.
- **MSG** (Active): Explore YES packaging; MPT/MG gap open.
- **YES Network** (Active): Schedule Feneque/Heuzey call on Exhibit B device-multiplier resolution.
- **YouTube TV** (Active - Pre-Contract): CRITICAL Aug 2026 NFL kickoff path. Final Sports Plan SKU pricing + firm date pending YTTV.
- **NHL** (Active): Joe owes FCO schedule + ad guidelines + term sheet to Barbara/Greenberg.
- **NBA League Pass** (Active): CRITICAL fix #REF! errors in NBA Pricing Excel before final pricing.
- **MLB** (2027): Holding; struck $5M MG (per W18 sweep).
- **PokerGO** (FAST): Send cleaned contract w/ Q3 timing; DAI monetization draft.
- **FloSports** (Active, FAST): DAI dependency open.
- **AccuWeather** (Active, FAST): Executable draft target was Apr 25 (OVERDUE 9 days); late-May launch target.
- **Victory+** (Active): NWSL Go/No-Go + Team Packs.
- **Amazon Prime Video** (Active): Cumulative Redline.docx pending.
- **UFC / Deltatre** (Active): Upshow 4th Amendment review.
- **ISM Connect** (Active): Confirm amendment effective date + Nations League Exhibit A.
- **CW Sports / Nexstar** (Exploratory): Resolve "[Nextstar]" entity bracket; obtain rate card.
- **BravesVision** (Active): Cravens/Killebrew call; confirm DTV commercial exclusivity scope. NotebookLM zero_sources 2nd consecutive week — notebook missing source docs.
- **Apple** (Live): Monitor.
- **NFL Sunday Ticket (NFLE)** (Live): Monitor Year-5 EBITDA gate (Mar 31, 2028); DTV PR/USVI residential renewal.
- **DAZN** (Exploratory): Project Gladiator boxing/FIFA+.
- **Mediacom / Samsung+LG / Red Bull / NASCAR / Fight League / Possible Core**: holding/exploratory.

items.text: ISM amendment term: this Agreement commences as of the Effective Date and, unless terminated earlier
NFL - Amendment No. 1 and Exhibit B - NFL Sunday Ticket Agreement (Fully Executed).md
NFL - Amendment No. 1 and Exhibit B - NFL Sunday Ticket Agreement (Fully Executed).pdf
NFL Draft Commercial Sunday Ticket Agreement_20230306_FULLY EXECUTED.md

bridge_signals.title: [Charter] Re: [EXTERNAL] Re: Charter | EverPass Extension
bridge_signals.summary: Quick question: is EverPass the only place for commercial customers to get the Peacock / NBCSN exclusive games (eg T-Wolves Spurs tonight)? Under impression NBCSN is resi-only due to your exclusive deal w/ NBC for sports on Peacock.

bridge_signals.title: [NESN] Everpass - NESN/SNP
bridge_signals.summary: Ryan, hi. Any sense as to when we'll see a response? Peter Plaehn, SVP Affiliate Distribution, NESN & SportsNet Pittsburgh.

bridge_signals.title: [Disney/ESPN] RE: ESPN+ for Business Schedule: 5/4-7/5
bridge_signals.summary: Title updates for this week's Softball championships and a canceled game picked up on linear. Will continue to update as changes come.

bridge_signals.title: [Charter] Re: [EXTERNAL] Re: Charter | EverPass Extension
bridge_signals.summary: No worries, induction day is tomorrow. Can't give exact ETA but we've made good progress. Hopefully something by the end of the week.

bridge_signals.title: [NBCU] REMINDER TO STREAM | NBCUniversal Upfront: May 11th
bridge_signals.summary: Reminder: NBCUniversal Upfront streaming May 11th. Follow social channels for updates.

bridge_signals.title: [Monumental] Re: Everpass/Monumental Tech & Marketing Follow Up
bridge_signals.summary: No worries (if you did I missed it and I apologize). Thanks buddy! Sent from Outlook for iOS.

bridge_signals.title: [Charter] Charter | EverPass Extension
bridge_signals.summary: Per our conversation earlier today: EverPass and Charter hereby agree to extend the negotiation period referenced in Section I.1 of the Binding Term Sheet entered into July 5, 2025.

bridge_signals.title: [Monumental] Re: Everpass/Monumental Tech & Marketing Follow Up
bridge_signals.summary: FYI a docusign went out this morning. Let me know if you did not receive it (may have gone to spam). Happy to resend if there was an issue.

bridge_signals.title: [YES] RE: [EXT] Re: [EXT] RE: YES-EverPass Partnership (as of 4.29.25)
bridge_signals.summary: Sounds good, yes I should be around next week. Would love to see you and catch up.

items.title: Video Visit with Sreeramya Kanumilli, MD for Baylor Ashton Fisher Blood
